abilities.effect: A branch grows from your prosthesis, quickly flowering and then producing 1d4 ripe and flavorful fruits. A creature can pick and eat a fruit with an Interact action to regain 2d6+5 Hit Points. The fruits wither away after 10 minutes.
abilities.name: Activate

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

stat_block.text: Woody vines and branches curl and twist around each other, growing small twigs, leaves, and flowers across the surface of this prosthetic arm or leg.

traits.name: Plant
traits.text: Vegetable creatures have the plant trait. They are distinct from normal plants. Magical effects with this trait manipulate or conjure plants or plant matter in some way. Effects that manipulate plants have no effect in an area with no plants.

traits.name: Primal
traits.text:
This magic comes from the primal tradition, connecting to the natural world and instinct. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to primal magic.
